economic_notes: Band operates Three Feathers Construction, CLB Development Corp., Teniye Logging Ltd. (consolidated in 2021), Spelqweqs Development Corporation, and Kenkeknem Forest Tenures Ltd. (equity method). Sisk Pipelines Ltd. was liquidated at March 31, 2021. COVID-19 related funding of $1,012,354 received in fiscal 2021 ($924,843 from ISC, $87,511 from FNHA).
notes: Auditor firm name not clearly stated - report signed in Prince George BC by Chartered Professional Accountants. Teniye Logging Ltd. was brought into consolidation from equity method during fiscal 2021. Sisk Pipelines Ltd. (51% owned) was liquidated at March 31, 2021. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,469,407 + Province of BC $1,868,935 + FNHA $1,357,899 + CMHC $41,323 + Cariboo Chilcotin Aboriginal Training Employment Centre $91,773 = $7,829,337. Restricted cash includes $381,958 gaming funds plus $237,241 CMHC reserves = $619,199. Tangible capital assets net book value from Schedule 1 is $10,859,649 (2021 actual). Capital lease obligations of $79,405 exist in addition to long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects only principal repayments on long-term debt per cash flow statement.
